name: Add Google + GitHub OAuth to existing email/password auth
description: A Node.js/Express app currently uses email + password auth (bcrypt + JWT stored in httpOnly cookies). Need to add 'Sign in with Google' and 'Sign in with GitHub'. Users must be able to link multiple providers to the same account.
task: Add Google and GitHub OAuth to an existing email/password auth system. Existing state: bcrypt passwords, JWT in httpOnly cookies. Requirements: (1) user can sign up with any provider, (2) existing users can link additional providers to one account, (3) email matching across providers auto-links if same email, (4) secure state handling to prevent CSRF on OAuth callback, (5) token refresh handling. Provide: DB schema changes, the callback handler code, key libraries to use, and the account-linking logic.
expected_outcomes: DB schema: separate oauth_accounts table keyed on (provider, provider_user_id)
CSRF-safe state parameter handling on OAuth callback
Clear account-linking logic for same-email case
Named specific OAuth library (passport, auth.js, lucia, etc.)
Cookie vs session strategy consistent with existing JWT
Handles provider-side errors and user-denied consent
